67446.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 31
67446.description: Charlie Ross steers the show, which comes from the British Motor Museum in Warwickshire. Experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant help the blue and red teams navigate the antique and collectors' fair, before they head off to the auction in Lichfield.
